name: crm114
description: A plugin that performs statistical text classification on documents using the CRM114 Discriminator. Stores classification models in pluginStorage.

process.description: Classify document text using CRM114 and return category scores.

filePath.description: The path to the file to be classified.

pluginStorage.description: Absolute path to the plugin's persistent storage directory.

categories.description: Map of category name to CRM114 pR confidence score (float). Only categories with pR > 0 are included.

learn.description: Non-interactive: train a category model with the text of a document.

category.description: Category name to train (alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot only).

pluginStorage.description: Absolute path to the plugin's persistent storage directory.

filePath.description: Path to the document whose text is used for training.

unlearn.description: Non-interactive: remove document text from a category model.

category.description: Category name to unlearn from (alphanumeric, dash, underscore, dot only).

pluginStorage.description: Absolute path to the plugin's persistent storage directory.

filePath.description: Path to the document whose text is removed from the model.

listCategories.description: List all category names that have a trained .css model in pluginStorage.

pluginStorage.description: Absolute path to the plugin's persistent storage directory.

categories.description: List of category names with trained models. Empty array if none.

train.description: Interactive training: iterate documents, display extracted text, and prompt y/n per document/category to learn or unlearn.

pluginStorage.description: Plugin storage directory. Derived automatically from -o <output-dir>.

inputDirectory.description: Path to directory of documents to label.

usage.description: Output directory. pluginStorage is derived as <output-dir>/.doc.doc.md/crm114/
Input directory containing documents to label.

installed.description: Check if crm114 and its tools are available on the system.
Indicates whether the crm114 tools are installed.

success.description: Indicates whether the crm114 tools were successfully installed.

message.description: Human-readable status message describing the installation result.
